description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the maven:3.5-jdk-8 Docker image globally, includes a docker:dind service, and caches the Maven repository at .m2/repository. Define three stages: build, test, and deploy, and set the MAVEN_CLI_OPTS and MAVEN_OPTS variables as specified. In the build stage add a compile job that runs only on the master and develop branches and executes "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS test-compile". In the test stage add a verify job that also runs only on master and develop, runs "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS verify", and uploads the JAR files matching target/*.jar as artifacts. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that uses the docker image, runs only on master and develop, logs in to registry.gitlab.com with "docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com", builds the image with "docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/dsncode/filemanager ." and pushes it with "docker push registry.gitlab.com/dsncode/filemanager", and is tagged with docker.
